message:
feat(browser): add session persistence, network guard, and sandbox placement profiles

Implement browser.session.{save,restore,describe} operations using CBOR
state objects with singleton-writer fencing (lease_seq/lease_object_id).
Add BrowserSessionMeshStore for mesh-backed session persistence.

- Network guard: control-plane host allowlist with HTTPS enforcement
  via validate_browser_control_plane_url() and is_browser_control_host_allowlisted()
- Sandbox placement profile: 1024MB memory, 75% CPU, 300s wall clock
  timeout, deny exec/ptrace
- Enhanced health and doctor endpoints with placement/network output
- Add fcp-cbor and blake3 dependencies
- Comprehensive integration tests with fencing token validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,10 +22,12 @@ workspace = true
 [dependencies]
 fcp-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-core" }
 fcp-async-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-async-core" }
+fcp-cbor = { path = "../../crates/fcp-cbor" }
 
 anyhow.workspace = true
 async-trait.workspace = true
 base64.workspace = true
+blake3.workspace = true
 bytes.workspace = true
 chrono.workspace = true
 futures-util.workspace = true

@@ -5,13 +5,13 @@ min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
 min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
 protocol_features = []
 max_datagram_bytes = 65000
-interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:8b24698fc2056483bc6bb740642a4aafabae20abe976a1ff6d7f1cd37080af2a"
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:2ff3729f3f97aa140413d9c9189205b60e1e785e5e61deb5a4451b4bd9ebae73"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.browser"
 name = "Browser Connector"
 version = "0.1.0"
-description = "FCP connector for headless browser automation — navigation, screenshots, extraction, form interaction, JS evaluation, and proxy controls"
+description = "FCP connector for headless browser automation — navigation, screenshots, extraction, form interaction, JS evaluation, session persistence, and proxy controls"
 archetypes = ["operational"]
 format = "wasi"
 
@@ -716,6 +716,274 @@ common_mistakes = ["Setting cookies on wrong domain — they won't be sent."]
 examples = ['{"cookies": [{"name": "session", "value": "abc123", "domain": "example.com", "path": "/"}]}']
 related = ["browser.get_cookies"]
 
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save"]
+description = "Persist current browser cookies as a mesh state object"
+capability = "browser.sessions"
+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "dangerous"
+requires_approval = "interactive"
+idempotency = "best_effort"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save".input_schema]
+required = ["lease_seq", "lease_object_id"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save".input_schema.properties.domain]
+description = "Optional domain scope when reading cookies"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save".input_schema.properties.lease_seq]
+description = "Singleton-writer fencing token for state update"
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save".input_schema.properties.lease_object_id]
+description = "Lease object identifier authorizing this state write"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save".output_schema]
+required = ["state_object_id", "seq", "lease_seq", "cookie_count", "payload_cbor_size", "captured_at"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save".output_schema.properties.state_object_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save".output_schema.properties.prev_state_object_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save".output_schema.properties.seq]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save".output_schema.properties.lease_seq]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save".output_schema.properties.lease_object_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save".output_schema.properties.cookie_count]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save".output_schema.properties.payload_cbor_size]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save".output_schema.properties.captured_at]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save".output_schema.properties.domain]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save".output_schema.properties.audit]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save".network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "*.github.com",
+    "*.google.com",
+    "*.wikipedia.org",
+    "*.amazonaws.com",
+]
+port_allow = [
+    80,
+    443,
+]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 15000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.save".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Persist browser cookies before failover or restart."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Using stale lease_seq values after singleton-writer failover.",
+    "Persisting the wrong domain scope.",
+]
+examples = ['{"domain":"example.com","lease_seq":12,"lease_object_id":"lease-obj-123"}']
+related = ["browser.session.restore", "browser.session.describe"]
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore"]
+description = "Restore browser cookies from a saved mesh state object"
+capability = "browser.sessions"
+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "dangerous"
+requires_approval = "interactive"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore".input_schema]
+required = ["lease_seq", "lease_object_id"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore".input_schema.properties.state_object_id]
+description = "Optional explicit state object id; defaults to current head"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore".input_schema.properties.lease_seq]
+description = "Singleton-writer fencing token for restore operation"
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore".input_schema.properties.lease_object_id]
+description = "Lease object identifier authorizing this restore"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore".output_schema]
+required = ["state_object_id", "restored_count", "lease_seq", "cookie_count", "captured_at"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore".output_schema.properties.state_object_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore".output_schema.properties.restored_count]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore".output_schema.properties.cookie_count]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore".output_schema.properties.seq]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore".output_schema.properties.saved_lease_seq]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore".output_schema.properties.lease_seq]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore".output_schema.properties.lease_object_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore".output_schema.properties.captured_at]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore".output_schema.properties.domain]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore".output_schema.properties.audit]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore".network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "*.github.com",
+    "*.google.com",
+    "*.wikipedia.org",
+    "*.amazonaws.com",
+]
+port_allow = [
+    80,
+    443,
+]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 15000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.restore".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Restore an authenticated browser session on a replacement worker."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Attempting restore without current lease metadata.",
+    "Assuming a head state object exists when none has been saved.",
+]
+examples = ['{"state_object_id":"state-obj-abc","lease_seq":13,"lease_object_id":"lease-obj-124"}']
+related = ["browser.session.save", "browser.get_cookies"]
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.describe"]
+description = "Describe metadata for a saved browser session state object without exposing cookie values"
+capability = "browser.sessions"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.describe".input_schema]
+required = []
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.describe".input_schema.properties.state_object_id]
+description = "Optional explicit state object id; defaults to current head"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.describe".output_schema]
+required = ["state_object_id", "seq", "lease_seq", "cookie_count", "captured_at", "payload_cbor_size", "is_head"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.describe".output_schema.properties.state_object_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.describe".output_schema.properties.prev_state_object_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.describe".output_schema.properties.seq]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.describe".output_schema.properties.lease_seq]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.describe".output_schema.properties.lease_object_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.describe".output_schema.properties.cookie_count]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.describe".output_schema.properties.captured_at]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.describe".output_schema.properties.domain]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.describe".output_schema.properties.payload_cbor_size]
+type = "integer"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.describe".output_schema.properties.is_head]
+type = "boolean"
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.describe".network_constraints]
+host_allow = [
+    "*.github.com",
+    "*.google.com",
+    "*.wikipedia.org",
+    "*.amazonaws.com",
+]
+port_allow = [
+    80,
+    443,
+]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 15000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."browser.session.describe".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Inspect saved session metadata without returning cookie contents."
+common_mistakes = ["Expecting this operation to return raw cookie values."]
+examples = ['{"state_object_id":"state-obj-abc"}']
+related = ["browser.session.save", "browser.session.restore"]
+
 [provides.operations."browser.set_proxy"]
 description = "Configure outbound proxy settings for browser traffic"
 capability = "browser.proxy"
@@ -916,7 +1184,7 @@ related = [
 ]
 
 [sandbox]
-profile = "moderate"
+profile = "strict"
 memory_mb = 1024
 cpu_percent = 75
 wall_clock_timeout_ms = 300000
@@ -925,7 +1193,7 @@ fs_readonly_paths = [
     "/lib",
 ]
 fs_writable_paths = ["$CONNECTOR_STATE"]
-deny_exec = false
+deny_exec = true
 deny_ptrace = true
 
 [[rate_limits.pools]]
@@ -977,6 +1245,13 @@ window_ms = 60000
 burst = 5
 scope = "instance"
 
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "browser.sessions"
+requests = 30
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 5
+scope = "instance"
+
 [rate_limits.operation_pools]
 "browser.navigate" = ["browser.navigate"]
 "browser.click" = ["browser.interact"]
@@ -991,3 +1266,6 @@ scope = "instance"
 "browser.fill_form" = ["browser.interact"]
 "browser.set_proxy" = ["browser.proxy"]
 "browser.clear_proxy" = ["browser.proxy"]
+"browser.session.save" = ["browser.sessions"]
+"browser.session.restore" = ["browser.sessions"]
+"browser.session.describe" = ["browser.sessions"]
